author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more Tier-3s (perf foundation + SCSI mid-layer):

- kernel/perf/perf-event-core.md: covers kernel/events/core.c (~15K lines) — perf_event_open(2) syscall + struct perf_event lifecycle: per-cpu and per-task contexts, scheduling events onto PMU hardware (counter/fixed-PMC/breakpoint slots), grouping (all-or-nothing), multiplexing (round-robin via hrtimer when more events than counters), inheritance (per-task events propagate to forked children), per-event-fd file_operations, sample emission to ring-buffer (cross-ref ring-buffer.md), BPF prog attach via PERF_EVENT_IOC_SET_BPF, per-event mmap (data + AUX), cgroup-attached events. 13 REQ / 10 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + attr-size-OOB + pmu-idx-OOB + bpf-UAF) / Layer-2 ref to event_scheduler.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus sched_in/_out round-trip.
- drivers/scsi/scsi-mid-core.md: covers drivers/scsi/{scsi,hosts,scsi_lib}.c — SCSI mid-layer brain: per-host (Scsi_Host) registration + per-target/per-LUN discovery, scsi_cmnd lifecycle (alloc → init → setup → dispatch → LLD queuecommand → scsi_done → finish), blk-mq integration (every request_queue for SCSI device), per-LUN queue-depth + per-host backpressure, sense-data parsing (auto-sense + scsi_check_sense + sense-key/asc/ascq → blk_status_t), EH escalation entry-point dispatching to per-host eh-thread, per-LUN state machine (CREATED → RUNNING → BLOCKED → CANCEL → DEL with valid-transition check). 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + cmd-len-OOB + state-transition-validity + sense-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to eh_escalation.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus dispatch↔done round-trip.

Total state: 248 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 14 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-perf-perf-event-core, design-drivers-scsi-scsi-mid-core.

Next iter plan: drivers/net/ethernet/intel-libeth.md (shared Intel queue/RSS lib + page-pool integration foundation for Intel NIC drivers) + drivers/iommu/iommufd-main.md (iommufd UAPI dispatch — modern /dev/iommu replacing legacy VFIO type1).
